summary: Wallet History (FREE11 Transaction History) feature fully tested. Backend 12/12 tests passed. Frontend UI working correctly with Coin History tab (default), FREE Bucks tab, color-coded transactions, summary cards, Profile menu item, and back button navigation.

issues: Shows '0 Purchases Made' even though there are 3 purchase records in FREE Bucks tab. This is intentional code behavior - it counts only payment_status='paid' items (paidPurchases.filter). Admin account has only CREATED/INITIATED purchases, so count=0 is correct per the filter logic. Not a bug, but may confuse users who see purchases in the tab but 0 in the card.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Purchases Made card counts only 'paid' status purchases. Purchases with 'created'/'initiated' status do appear in the FREE Bucks tab list but are excluded from the summary count. This is by design but could be made clearer in the UI (e.g., label as 'Completed Purchases').
Payment status 'initiated' is a valid status in prod data but was not in the original valid_statuses test set - minor test data issue, not a code issue.
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - admin account had existing coin transactions (7) and payment records (3 with CREATED/INITIATED status)

features_tested.backend_200_with_auth: PASS - Returns 200 with valid auth token
features_tested.backend_both_arrays: PASS - Response contains both free_bucks_purchases and coin_transactions arrays
features_tested.backend_purchase_structure: PASS - Purchases have amount, payment_status fields
features_tested.backend_coin_txn_structure: PASS - Coin transactions have type, timestamp, and amount info
features_tested.frontend_coin_tab_default: PASS - Coin History tab active by default (gold color #C6A052)
features_tested.frontend_color_coding: PASS - Credits show green (+50, +25, +5), debits show red (-25)
features_tested.frontend_freebucks_tab: PASS - FREE Bucks tab switches correctly, shows 3 purchase records
features_tested.frontend_status_badges: PASS - CREATED/INITIATED show yellow, PAID would show green (code verified)
features_tested.frontend_summary_purchases: PASS - Purchases Made shows count of paid purchases (0 for admin)
features_tested.frontend_profile_wallet_menu: PASS - Profile page has 'Wallet History' menu item with Wallet icon
features_tested.frontend_profile_navigation: PASS - Clicking 'Wallet History' in Profile navigates to /wallet

context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet History feature (FREE11) is fully implemented and working. Backend: GET /api/v2/payments/history at v2_routes.py line 532, queries payment_transactions and coin_transactions collections, excludes _id. Frontend: Wallet.js has getTxnDirection() helper for schema variants (credit/debit fields, amount+type, or description parsing). Profile.js menuItems includes Wallet History linking to /wallet. Route at App.js line 128 as PrivateRoute. All tabs, color coding, navigation, and back button working correctly.
